title: PM Schema V2 UI Baseline Overlay And Read-Model Hardening
objective: Implement the smallest bounded follow-on to UI-002b by exposing one explicit persisted baseline-display source through a read-only schedule-consumption path and rendering baseline-versus-current comparison in the PM Gantt surface without enabling schedule writes, synthetic baseline fabrication, drag-to-reschedule, Class D behavior, billing finalization, or direct client writes for controlled operational state.
active_role: PM UI Baseline Overlay And Read-Model Hardening Architect
constrained_outputs: One bounded read-only baseline-display source selection tied to already persisted truth, with no synthetic baseline fabrication
One minimal GET-only read-model or bridge hardening slice exposing baseline dates or baseline-ready variance metadata to the PM schedule surface
One bounded PM Gantt follow-on rendering baseline-versus-current comparison, slip visibility, and legend updates without enabling schedule writes
One execution handoff documenting baseline source, bridge changes, rendered comparison behavior, validation results, and remaining deferred items
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-002c preserves the read-only posture of the PM schedule surface and does not introduce drag-to-reschedule, inline dependency editing, or schedule-write behavior
Confirm the baseline comparison surface binds only to an explicit persisted source already authorized by the platform and does not fabricate baseline truth in the client
Confirm any mutation-seam or schedule-bridge changes remain GET-only and read-only by construction
Confirm no Class D behavior, billing finalization flow, direct client writes, or broad production-hardening-by-convenience are introduced
sql_permission_note: Packet UI-002c authorizes only read-only inspection and bounded GET-only bridge hardening. It does not authorize direct SQL writes, schedule-write behavior, synthetic baseline fabrication, Class D finance behavior, or billing finalization.
